---
title: "Code"
---

**[Section under construction...]**

I am interested about writing robust, well-documented, and reproducible scientific code. 
My public repositories are hosted on [my GitHub page](https://github.com/emgonzher).

I believe research codes should be **open-source**, **reproducible**, and 
**freely available** to the scientific community.


## Solvers & Libraries

::: {.project-card}
### [Collapsible channels & tubes](https://github.com/your-username/project1)
::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon (hopefully)
Acces to updated git-hub repository with examples and tutorials
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Solid Mechanics](https://github.com/your-username/project2)
::: {.callout-note}
## Coming soon (hopefully)
Acces to updated git-hub repository with examples and tutorials
:::
:::
